summary: React key warning fix verification complete. The original fix attempt (changing key prop) was insufficient because Radix UI Select uses the value prop internally as a key. Fixed by using unique template IDs as values instead of duplicate template names.
passed_tests: SendPage template dropdown - NO React key warnings on page load
SendPage template dropdown - NO React key warnings when opening dropdown
SendPage template dropdown - 13 templates displayed correctly
SendPage template dropdown - Template selection functional
SendPage template dropdown - Language code updates correctly on selection
